sizing_rule.note: Optimal f derived from geometric mean of HPRs across all position combinations within ±8SD ranges. Accounts for random or causal relationships between positions. Specific f value and Kelly fraction not provided by author (AUTHOR_SILENT). Requires HPR calculation across multi-dimensional probability space per equation 5.25.

source_rule_text: Use optimal f technique for multiple simultaneous positions by calculating geometric mean of HPRs across all position combinations within standard deviation ranges, accounting for random or causal relationships between positions.
